title: Spanish 900: Daily Life & Errands
focus: Practical everyday Spanish for routines, chores, appointments, studying, and general interactions.

sentences.spanish: Me levanto a las siete todos los días.
sentences.english: I get up at seven o'clock every day.

sentences.spanish: Siempre desayuno café con leche y pan tostado.
sentences.english: I always have coffee with milk and toast for breakfast.

sentences.spanish: Tengo que salir de casa a las ocho menos cuarto.
sentences.english: I have to leave the house at a quarter to eight.

sentences.spanish: ¿A qué hora te acuestas normalmente?
sentences.english: What time do you usually go to bed?

sentences.spanish: Los fines de semana duermo hasta tarde.
sentences.english: On weekends I sleep in late.

sentences.spanish: Nunca veo la televisión por la mañana.
sentences.english: I never watch television in the morning.

sentences.spanish: Antes de dormir, siempre leo un poco.
sentences.english: Before going to sleep, I always read a little.

sentences.spanish: Me ducho con agua fría en verano.
sentences.english: I shower with cold water in the summer.

sentences.spanish: Mi hermano siempre usa el baño primero.
sentences.english: My brother always uses the bathroom first.

sentences.spanish: Los domingos cenamos con mis abuelos.
sentences.english: On Sundays we have dinner with my grandparents.

sentences.spanish: Hoy me toca lavar los platos.
sentences.english: It's my turn to wash the dishes today.

sentences.spanish: Tienes que sacar la basura esta noche.
sentences.english: You have to take out the trash tonight.

sentences.spanish: No me gusta nada planchar la ropa.
sentences.english: I don't like ironing clothes at all.

sentences.spanish: ¿Puedes ayudarme a limpiar el salón?
sentences.english: Can you help me clean the living room?

sentences.spanish: Hay que barrer el suelo de la cocina.
sentences.english: The kitchen floor needs to be swept.

sentences.spanish: Mañana voy a lavar toda mi ropa sucia.
sentences.english: Tomorrow I'm going to wash all my dirty laundry.

sentences.spanish: La nevera está vacía, tenemos que hacer la compra.
sentences.english: The fridge is empty, we have to go grocery shopping.

sentences.spanish: Necesito comprar detergente para la lavadora.
sentences.english: I need to buy detergent for the washing machine.

sentences.spanish: ¿Has limpiado tu habitación ya?
sentences.english: Have you cleaned your room yet?

sentences.spanish: Yo cocino hoy y tú limpias mañana.
sentences.english: I cook today and you clean tomorrow.

sentences.spanish: Voy al banco a sacar dinero.
sentences.english: I'm going to the bank to withdraw money.

sentences.spanish: ¿Dónde está la oficina de correos más cercana?
sentences.english: Where is the nearest post office?

sentences.spanish: Tengo que enviar este paquete a México.
sentences.english: I have to send this package to Mexico.

sentences.spanish: ¿Aceptan tarjetas de crédito o solo efectivo?
sentences.english: Do you accept credit cards or only cash?

sentences.spanish: Necesito comprar sellos para estas cartas.
sentences.english: I need to buy stamps for these letters.

sentences.spanish: Voy al supermercado, ¿necesitas algo?
sentences.english: I'm going to the supermarket, do you need anything?

sentences.spanish: ¿A qué hora cierra la panadería hoy?
sentences.english: What time does the bakery close today?

sentences.spanish: Quería un kilo de manzanas y medio kilo de tomates.
sentences.english: I would like a kilo of apples and half a kilo of tomatoes.

sentences.spanish: He perdido mi recibo, lo siento mucho.
sentences.english: I lost my receipt, I'm very sorry.

sentences.spanish: El cajero automático no funciona.
sentences.english: The ATM is not working.

sentences.spanish: Tengo cita con el médico a las cuatro y media.
sentences.english: I have a doctor's appointment at half past four.

sentences.spanish: Quisiera cancelar mi cita para mañana.
sentences.english: I would like to cancel my appointment for tomorrow.

sentences.spanish: Necesito ir al dentista porque me duele una muela.
sentences.english: I need to go to the dentist because I have a toothache.

sentences.spanish: ¿Tienen alguna hora libre el jueves por la mañana?
sentences.english: Do you have any free time on Thursday morning?

sentences.spanish: Llego un poco tarde a mi cita con el peluquero.
sentences.english: I'm running a little late for my hair appointment.

sentences.spanish: La reunión empieza en diez minutos.
sentences.english: The meeting starts in ten minutes.

sentences.spanish: ¿Podemos cambiar la cita para el viernes?
sentences.english: Can we change the appointment to Friday?

sentences.spanish: Llámame cuando salgas del médico.
sentences.english: Call me when you leave the doctor's office.

sentences.spanish: El doctor no puede verte hoy, está ocupado.
sentences.english: The doctor can't see you today, he is busy.

sentences.spanish: No olvides tu cita en el ayuntamiento mañana.
sentences.english: Don't forget your appointment at the town hall tomorrow.

sentences.spanish: No sabía que la biblioteca cerraba tan temprano.
sentences.english: I didn't know the library closed so early.

sentences.spanish: Tengo mucha tarea de matemáticas para el lunes.
sentences.english: I have a lot of math homework for Monday.

sentences.spanish: ¿Me prestas tus apuntes de historia, por favor?
sentences.english: Can you lend me your history notes, please?

sentences.spanish: El examen de inglés fue muy difícil.
sentences.english: The English exam was very difficult.

sentences.spanish: ¿A qué hora es la clase de español?
sentences.english: What time is the Spanish class?

sentences.spanish: No entiendo esta lección, ¿puedes explicarme?
sentences.english: I don't understand this lesson, can you explain it to me?

sentences.spanish: Mañana tengo que entregar un trabajo importante.
sentences.english: Tomorrow I have to hand in an important paper.

sentences.spanish: ¿Vamos a la cafetería a estudiar juntos?
sentences.english: Shall we go to the cafeteria to study together?

sentences.spanish: El profesor no ha venido hoy.
sentences.english: The teacher hasn't come today.

sentences.spanish: Necesito comprar un cuaderno nuevo.
sentences.english: I need to buy a new notebook.

sentences.spanish: Trabajo de lunes a viernes, de nueve a cinco.
sentences.english: I work from Monday to Friday, from nine to five.

sentences.spanish: Mi jefe es muy amable, pero muy exigente.
sentences.english: My boss is very kind, but very demanding.

sentences.spanish: Hoy he tenido un día muy pesado en la oficina.
sentences.english: Today I had a very heavy day at the office.

sentences.spanish: ¿Puedes enviarme ese documento por correo electrónico?
sentences.english: Can you send me that document by email?

sentences.spanish: Tengo una entrevista de trabajo la próxima semana.
sentences.english: I have a job interview next week.

sentences.spanish: La impresora no tiene papel otra vez.
sentences.english: The printer is out of paper again.

sentences.spanish: Me gustaría pedir unas vacaciones en agosto.
sentences.english: I would like to request some vacation time in August.

sentences.spanish: Trabajo en equipo con tres compañeros más.
sentences.english: I work in a team with three other colleagues.

sentences.spanish: Mañana tengo que llegar temprano al trabajo.
sentences.english: Tomorrow I have to arrive early to work.

sentences.spanish: ¿Cuánto tiempo llevas trabajando en esta empresa?
sentences.english: How long have you been working in this company?

sentences.spanish: ¿Qué vas a hacer este fin de semana?
sentences.english: What are you going to do this weekend?

sentences.spanish: ¿Quieres ir al cine conmigo el sábado?
sentences.english: Do you want to go to the movies with me on Saturday?

sentences.spanish: Lo siento, pero no puedo ir a tu fiesta.
sentences.english: I'm sorry, but I can't go to your party.

sentences.spanish: Te invito a tomar un café esta tarde.
sentences.english: I invite you to have a coffee this afternoon.

sentences.spanish: ¿Nos vemos en la plaza a las seis?
sentences.english: Shall we meet at the square at six?

sentences.spanish: Me encantaría ir, gracias por la invitación.
sentences.english: I would love to go, thank you for the invitation.

sentences.spanish: ¿Por qué no vamos a cenar a ese restaurante italiano?
sentences.english: Why don't we go to dinner at that Italian restaurant?

sentences.spanish: Todavía no sé si voy a salir esta noche.
sentences.english: I still don't know if I'm going out tonight.

sentences.spanish: Avísame cuando llegues a casa.
sentences.english: Let me know when you get home.

sentences.spanish: Qué pena, ya tengo planes para mañana.
sentences.english: What a shame, I already have plans for tomorrow.

sentences.spanish: No me siento muy bien hoy.
sentences.english: I don't feel very well today.

sentences.spanish: Creo que tengo fiebre y me duele la cabeza.
sentences.english: I think I have a fever and my head hurts.

sentences.spanish: Necesito algo para el dolor de garganta.
sentences.english: I need something for a sore throat.

sentences.spanish: ¿Tengo que tomar esta medicina antes o después de comer?
sentences.english: Do I have to take this medicine before or after eating?

sentences.spanish: Estoy muy resfriado desde ayer.
sentences.english: I've had a bad cold since yesterday.

sentences.spanish: ¿Hay una farmacia de guardia por aquí cerca?
sentences.english: Is there an on-call pharmacy near here?

sentences.spanish: Tienes que descansar en la cama y beber mucha agua.
sentences.english: You have to rest in bed and drink a lot of water.

sentences.spanish: Me he cortado el dedo cocinando.
sentences.english: I cut my finger while cooking.

sentences.spanish: Soy alérgico a la penicilina.
sentences.english: I am allergic to penicillin.

sentences.spanish: ¿Tiene alguna pastilla para el mareo?
sentences.english: Do you have any pills for motion sickness?

sentences.spanish: Mi piso tiene dos dormitorios y un baño pequeño.
sentences.english: My apartment has two bedrooms and a small bathroom.

sentences.spanish: El alquiler es bastante caro en esta ciudad.
sentences.english: Rent is quite expensive in this city.

sentences.spanish: Los vecinos hacen mucho ruido por la noche.
sentences.english: The neighbors make a lot of noise at night.

sentences.spanish: La calefacción no funciona y hace frío.
sentences.english: The heating isn't working and it's cold.

sentences.spanish: Necesito llamar al fontanero porque el lavabo pierde agua.
sentences.english: I need to call the plumber because the sink is leaking.

sentences.spanish: Acabo de mudarme a este barrio.
sentences.english: I just moved to this neighborhood.

sentences.spanish: Las llaves están encima de la mesa del comedor.
sentences.english: The keys are on top of the dining room table.

sentences.spanish: Cierra bien la puerta con llave cuando salgas.
sentences.english: Lock the door well when you leave.

sentences.spanish: Voy a pintar las paredes de mi cuarto de blanco.
sentences.english: I'm going to paint my bedroom walls white.

sentences.spanish: El ascensor está estropeado, hay que usar las escaleras.
sentences.english: The elevator is broken, we have to use the stairs.

sentences.spanish: ¿A qué hora sale el próximo tren para Madrid?
sentences.english: What time does the next train to Madrid leave?

sentences.spanish: Un billete de ida y vuelta, por favor.
sentences.english: A round-trip ticket, please.

sentences.spanish: ¿De qué andén sale el autobús?
sentences.english: Which platform does the bus leave from?

sentences.spanish: Perdón, ¿para ir a la estación de metro?
sentences.english: Excuse me, how do I get to the subway station?

sentences.spanish: Tienes que bajar en la tercera parada.
sentences.english: You have to get off at the third stop.

sentences.spanish: El vuelo está retrasado por el mal tiempo.
sentences.english: The flight is delayed due to bad weather.

sentences.spanish: ¿Cuánto cuesta un taxi hasta el aeropuerto?
sentences.english: How much does a taxi to the airport cost?

sentences.spanish: He perdido mi maleta en el aeropuerto.
sentences.english: I lost my suitcase at the airport.

sentences.spanish: El museo está a cinco minutos a pie desde aquí.
sentences.english: The museum is a five-minute walk from here.

sentences.spanish: Gira a la derecha en el próximo semáforo.
sentences.english: Turn right at the next traffic light.
